title: 願いを叶えるクリスマスカラー

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nice Nature's signature racewear has arrived, so I
have her try it on immediately to see how it looks.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I like how it's not too flashy, yet not too
bland—just like me. I think it's nice.
choice_data_list: It's a little low-key, but I like it.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Right? I didn't want the design to be too gaudy
and end up with my clothes wearing me.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
All the elements I wanted in the design are
included. I think it looks about right.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Speaking of design choices, I take another look
at her signature racewear.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's a striking ensemble—red and green from ear
covers to sleeves, with matching bows.
choice_data_list: Really reminds me of the holidays.
Really reminds me of the holidays.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Doesn't it? It's a little out of character for me, but
the holidays actually mean a lot to me.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: My mom raised me all by herself.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
She worked all the time to support me with
almost no rest... day in and day out.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I didn't want to cause her any more trouble, so I
tried not to be too demanding.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
But during that special time of year, I could be a
child.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I wholeheartedly believed that Santa existed, so I
always made sure to send him a letter with my list.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Stuff like, "I wanna have a big party with my mom!
And make it flashy!"

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
After I asked for that, my mom and the regulars
at the bar started having a holiday party for me
every year.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
We had chicken skewers instead of roast chicken,
bar snacks instead of a cake, a disco ball for the
lights...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I know it's far from what others consider normal, but it felt big and flashy to me.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Heh, looking back, I was such a pure child, not
knowing who the real Santa was!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
They put together a holiday party the year I was
accepted into Tracen Academy too...

text_block_list.name: Bar Regular A
text_block_list.text:
It's that time of year again! And look who's here,
Natie! Santa!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Hey, stop that! I'm not a kid anymore!

text_block_list.name: Bar Regular B
text_block_list.text:
So? You're never too old for Santa. Remember
when you told us we were all Santa for throwing
these parties for you? That really made our day.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Hnnngh... Sorry... I was such a little child back
then.

text_block_list.name: Bar Regular B
text_block_list.text: Don't apologize! Now it's your turn to make our wishes come true!

text_block_list.name: Bar Regular C
text_block_list.text:
That's right! This year, we're asking Santa to let us
see you blazing down the track!

text_block_list.name: Bar Regular A
text_block_list.text:
Go for the gold! Let's celebrate again when you
get first place!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: They really cheered for me, but look at me now...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I ask if she was thinking of their wish when she
chose this signature racewear.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Haha... You know me so well...
choice_data_list: Sounds like we've got some work to do!
It's the perfect racewear for you!
It's the perfect racewear for you!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Haha... You know me so well...
choice_data_list: Sounds like we've got some work to do!
It's the perfect racewear for you!
It's the perfect racewear for you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her mother and the regulars back home... Not to
mention the people from the shopping district
who she got to know here...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They're all wishing for her victory. Which means
our goal is...
choice_data_list:
Let's become their Santa and make their wishes
come true!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: A-again with the Santa thing...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I don't know... Sounds like a lot of pressure. This
egg just might crack.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Well, aren't you just the picture of confidence?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
If I'm Santa, then that would make you... a
reindeer? Haha, we should get you a red nose.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If possible, I'd like to avoid wearing a red nose,
but I feel like it'd be okay as long as it makes
Nice Nature happy.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Right. I don't know what to say, but...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I'm glad you have such high hopes for me. Haha.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Her tone is sarcastic, but she seems happy.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: What do you mean by that?
choice_data_list: We're making your next race a real flashy affair!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Flashy, huh? I wonder if I can pull that off.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I guess I'll try. I owe everyone, including you, at
least that much.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It won't be too long until she makes everyone's
wishes come true. Seeing Nice Nature in her
signature racewear makes me sure of it.
